rows.label: tev046301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev046301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Prea about life in NLA.

rows.label: tev046301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev046301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Prea if she's heard
any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev046301_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Prea about recent developments.

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0001
rows.name: I am glad I chose to room with females.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0002
rows.name:
We can dance without
worrying about prying eyes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0003
rows.name:
I have been teaching Lucia and Chanty
our dance. Lucia has talent! Dancing
with her is fun. But Chanty...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well, I think a mangled puge
would be more graceful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0007
rows.name: Best Tree Clan dancer is Thea Pilattis.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0008
rows.name:
But something happened to Thea. She
refuses to dance since coming to city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0009
rows.name:
I do not understand. She is free from
Growth. She can dance to heart's content.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0010
rows.name:
It is shame. Her Warrior's
Dance was sight to behold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0025
rows.name:
I saw Thea dance Warrior's Dance again
at diner! It is good to have her back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0026
rows.name:
No one else can compare.
None are on her level.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0027
rows.name:
Just watching her fills heart with
courage. Makes one long for battle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0028
rows.name:
She should be on front lines when final battle
comes. BLADEs and Bias alike will be filled
with bravery. None will stand against us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Prea about life in NLA.

rows.label: tev046301_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Prea about recent developments.

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0029
rows.name:
I have been teaching Lucia
and Chanty our dance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0030
rows.name:
Lucia has talent. She could dance at
any Bias festival! But Chanty...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0031
rows.name:
Well, I think a mangled puge
would be more graceful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0032
rows.name:
Dance is so funny that Pulala laughs
and falls into pool. Then I laugh too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0033
rows.name:
After so long under Growth's lash, I
had forgotten how to have such fun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0036
rows.name:
Thanks to you and elite Earth
alien, Pulala seems much better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0037
rows.name:
Now Nopon friends killed by Blood-king
Gelvo Banth can rest in peace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0038
rows.name: I hope we can count on you again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0040
rows.name: ...You too, elite Earth alien![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0041
rows.name: Ha! Like you even need to ask.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0042
rows.name:
I eat scum like that for
breakfast on a daily basis.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046301_MSG0043
rows.name:
You have very strange eating habits.
At least you are nice person![ST:wait ]
